title: rateLimited SetError handling in Message/set
description:
Handle rateLimited SetError returned by Message/set when slowModeSeconds is active:
- Define RateLimitedError struct with serverRetryAfter: UTCDate field
- Return ClientError::RateLimited(retry_after: DateTime) from message_create
- Callers (TUI compose bar) should display countdown to retry_after
- Fixture test: server returns rateLimited error, assert ClientError::RateLimited is returned with correct retry_after

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/message_set_rate_limited.json
